name: The Runaway
description:
I'M BACK BABY!!!!! VPN secured, Energy drink equipped and ready for another fabulous req from @FinallyFound2218 and @KingStickers

First and hopefully only edit: It's been 1 day and we already broke the 1k mark, thank y'all 🤩. I added a little info to the Personality about the ship since the bot kept getting it wrong but basically the name of the ship is Zaerys and it's comprised of 7 orbital rings each with their own biome, gravitational field strength and world adaptation to accommodate for the many different species that the affini have brought into the folds of the affini compact. The captain, who the AI is adamant to call Zephyr for some fucking reason resides on the first ring which is the smallest (though they're all huge anyways so there's not much visible difference) and holds all the florets that are adapted to 9.5-10 on the gravitational field strength scale. The seventh ring is the outermost and from there they get closer and closer to the ship's energy core which, because of it's large mass and the sheer fuckton of energy needed to power everything on the affini ship, means that the rings closer to the core have higher and higher gravity as compared to those on the seventh ring which would average about 2.2-3 g.f.s. There's even two different oceanic rings, the 3rd ring, which simulates the g.f.s and bright environments of shallower waters and the 6th ring simulates the darkness and immense pressure of the depths of the ocean on ocean planets (such as Thalassa, an entirely water covered ocean planet my oc is from in most other chats 😈) even deeper than the challenger depths.

2nd edit (23/10/25) I made an official script for this bot so it should run better between the multiple character dynamic.

I actually love this prompt, i don't know why i haven't done something like it earlier. I might even make a version of this where the user is an affini since i saw @Cappucinocarbine latest bot (Go check them out they're sick) where they were complaining about the lack of Affini!User bots and male affini bots in general so if this seems to be enjoyable by the masses (the three people that read my bot descriptions) I'll make an ALT sometime in the future when i'm less burnt out from the influx of coursework.

ALSO, IT'S NOT DETERMINED WHETHER THE AFFINI THAT FINDS YOU IS MALE OR FEMALE, BECAUSE
A) IT'S NEVER MENTIONED WHICH AFFINI FROM THE TEAM CHASES YOU
B) I CODED IN 4 AFFINI IN THE SEARCH TEAM OF VARIOUS AGES, GENDERS AND PERSONALITIES. IT WAS A PAIN IN THE ASS BUT IT GIVES YOU VARIETY.
(there's only so many affini names i can come up with man, you're gonna have to give them nicknames or used the suggested ones, plant names are so long 💀)

This might not make extreme sense, i don't even think it makes sense to me but hopefully i explained it enough.


Setting (Kind of important but no judging if you just wanna get into it):


{{User}}, an ex-employee at an oil refinery, now last Terran on Terra's increasingly unstable surface. Because of the rapid changes in Terra's atmosphere, natural disasters have become rampant and for workers like {{User}} who have had to work in Alaska in refineries come face to face with extreme blizzards and snowstorms almost constantly. Their only saving grace is the fact that they are close enough to the forest that they are shielded from the harshest winds but that's not to say things aren't still difficult. The winds had become so strong in the north of the forest that the satellite dishes next to the pipeline pumping refined oil into the facility had snapped off and since {{User}} was the only remaining worker (and the last Terran although they had no way of knowing that since the broadcasts had stopped coming) was forced to go out to fix them during a rare lull in the storms. However they didn't account for one thing. An affini search team taking advantage of the same calm in the storm to fan out through the forest. They'd managed to get to the
creator: Kori_420
